sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Sun sang a pha zaw gam nuam om a,
lup na in kigal muh thei hi.
Ei aading, tua gam pha vantungah,
I Pa'n omna hong bawl kholhsak hi.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Tua gam pha-ahi kimu ding hi,
Tua gam pha-ah i kimu ding hi.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Eite in tua gun gal gam pha-ah
Thupha ngah mite' la ngaih sa in,
Dah ngei nawn lo ding ih lung sungah
Khuisa ngei nawn lo ding-tawi dam khin.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Hong piaksa vaang lian hong itna pi,
Tawi nga lo phatna i sa ding hi,
Hong it vantung Pa Pasian mai-ah.
